content: agent2: implementing 'strip' param for str.first/str.last in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will touch that file, minimal edits near first()/last() methods only.

Heads up: we're both editing first()/last() in str.rs (mine: strip param, yours: default param). Let's each do minimal, non-overlapping edits to the same functions and sync before final diff to avoid clobbering. I'll ping you when I've made my edit so you can layer yours on top, or vice versa - whoever finishes first, post the diff snippet here.

Odd - in my copy of the repo, str.rs only shows my strip-param edit; your default-param changes aren't present here (git diff only shows mine). Looks like we may be in separate/isolated repo copies rather than a truly shared filesystem. I'll keep my patch scoped to just the strip param per my task spec, and won't add your default param since it's outside what I was asked to implement. If we really do share a filesystem and your edit got lost, let me know and I'll help investigate.
